'''旧暦3月14日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[正嘉]]元年（[[1257年]]_月_日） - 正嘉に改元 * [[元禄]]14年（[[1701年]]_月_日） - 江戸城松の廊下で赤穂藩主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹 * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]]_月_日） - 石見・出雲で[[マグニチュード|M]]7.1の浜田地震
== 誕生日 == * [[明応]]6年（[[1497年]]_月_日） - [[毛利元就]]、 戦国武将 （+ [[1571年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元禄]]14年（[[1701年]]_月_日） - [[浅野長矩|浅野内匠頭長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667年]]） * [[寛政]]元年（[[1789年]]_月_日） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月13日 (旧暦)|3月13日]] 翌日[[3月15日 (旧暦)|3月15日]] - 前月[[2月14日 (旧暦)|2月14日]] 翌月[[4月14日 (旧暦)|4月14日]] *新暦[[3月14日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[延暦]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[800年]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1257年]][[3月31日]]） - [[康元]]より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[元禄]]14年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1701年]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[元禄赤穂事件]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[4月21日]]） - 石見・出雲で[[マグニチュード|M7.1]]の浜田地震
== 誕生日 == * [[明応]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1497年]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1571年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]）

== 誕生日 == * [[明応]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1497年]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}}、[[武将]]（+ [[1571年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]）
== 忌日 == * 元禄14年（グレゴリオ暦1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667年]]） * [[寛政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1789年]][[4月9日]]） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月14日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[800年]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1257年]][[3月31日]]） - [[康元]]より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[元禄]]14年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1701年]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談
== 誕生日 == * [[明応]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1497年]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}}、[[武将]]（+ [[1571年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]）
== 忌日 == * 元禄14年（グレゴリオ暦1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667年]]） * [[寛政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1789年]][[4月9日]]） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

{{Lunar March}} '''Lunar March14日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[800年]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1257年]][[3月31日]]） - [[康元]]より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[元禄]]14年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1701年]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談
== 誕生日 == * [[明応]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1497年]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}}、[[武将]]（+ [[1571年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]）
== 忌日 == * 元禄14年（グレゴリオ暦1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667年]]） * [[寛政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1789年]][[4月9日]]） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}
[[Category:untranslated pages]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ_Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:deprecated qqs front]]<!----->[[Category:deprecated qqs back]] [[Category:deprecated qqs front]]<!--3月14日 (旧暦)-->[[Category:deprecated qqs back]] [[Category:japanese Lunar Calendar]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]][[en:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:New pages]] [[sn:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:ppp]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Lunar March]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]] {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}}

revision.comment: idk what haoppened but removing and re-adding the template
Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days
Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

revision.text:
'''March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar March}} ''March 14'''<!--Lunar March14--> is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[800年]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1257年]][[3月31日]]） - [[康元]]より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[元禄]]14年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1701年]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談
== 誕生日 == * [[明応]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1497年]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}}、[[武将]]（+ [[1571年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]）
== 忌日 == * 元禄14年（グレゴリオ暦1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667年]]） * [[寛政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1789年]][[4月9日]]） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}
[[Category:untranslated pages]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ_Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:deprecated qqs front]]<!----->[[Category:deprecated qqs back]] [[Category:deprecated qqs front]]<!--3月14日 (旧暦)-->[[Category:deprecated qqs back]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]][[en:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:New pages]] [[sn:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:ppp]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Lunar March]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]] {{citation needed}}

'''March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar March}} ''March 14'''<!--Lunar March14--> is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== Events == * [[延暦]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[800年]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1257年]][[3月31日]]） - [[康元]]より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[元禄]]14年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1701年]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談
== Births == * [[明応]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1497年]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}}、[[武将]]（+ [[1571年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]）
== Deaths == * 元禄14年（グレゴリオ暦1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667年]]） * [[寛政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1789年]][[4月9日]]） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723年]]）
== Commemorations ==

<!--== {{Lunar March}} ''March 14'''<!--Lunar March14 is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
--> == Events == * [[延暦]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[800年]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1257年]][[3月31日]]） - [[康元]]より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[元禄]]14年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1701年]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談

== Deaths == * 元禄14年（グレゴリオ暦1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667年]]） * [[寛政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1789年]][[4月9日]]） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723年]]）

--> == Events == * [[延暦]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[800年]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1257年]][[3月31日]]） - [[康元]]より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[元禄]]14年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1701年]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談
== Births == * [[明応]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1497年]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}}、[[武将]]（+ [[1571年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]）
== Deaths == * 元禄14年（グレゴリオ暦1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667年]]） * [[寛政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1789年]][[4月9日]]） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723年]]）
== Commemorations ==

removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it

[[sn:March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]] [[zh:三月十四]] [[en:draft:March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[延暦]]19th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[800]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1257]][[3月31日]]） - [[康元]]より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[元禄]]14th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1701]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]]） * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談
== Births == * [[明応]]6th year（ユリウス暦[[1497]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}}、[[武将]]（+ [[1571]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1809]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858]]）
== Deaths == * 元禄14th year（グレゴリオ暦1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667]]） * [[寛政]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1789]][[4月9日]]） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723]]）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]] [[zh:三月十四]] [[en:draft:March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[延暦]]19th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[800]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1257]][[3月31日]]） - [[康元]]より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]]14th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1701]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]]） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1868]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談
== Births == * [[明応]]6th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1497]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}}、[[武将]]（+ [[1571]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1809]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858]]）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667]]） * [[Kansei]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1789]][[4月9日]]） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}

revision.text:
[[sn:March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]] [[zh:三月十四]] [[en:draft:March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}}19th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[800]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1257]][[3月31日]]） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}}より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]]14th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1701]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]]） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1868]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}}6th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1497]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}}、[[武将]]（+ [[1571]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1809]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858]]）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667]]） * [[Kansei]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1789]][[4月9日]]） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}}19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]][[3月31日]]） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}}より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]]14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]]） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}}6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}}、[[武将]]（+ [[1571]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858]]）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667]]） * [[Kansei]]1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]][[4月9日]]） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723]]）

[[sn:March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]] [[zh:三月十四]] [[en:draft:March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[4月11日]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[3月31日]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[4月21日]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[4月6日]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[勝海舟]] ・[[西郷隆盛]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[4月16日]] ） - [[毛利元就]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、[[武将]] （+ [[1571]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[4月28日]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[薩摩藩]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[4月9日]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[思想家]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]] [[zh:三月十四]] [[en:draft:March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[4月11日]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[3月31日]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[4月21日]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[4月6日]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[勝海舟]] ・[[西郷隆盛]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[4月16日]] ） - [[毛利元就]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、[[武将]] （+ [[1571]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[4月28日]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[薩摩藩]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[4月9日]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[思想家]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}

[[sn:March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]] [[zh:三月十四]] [[en:draft:March 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[4月11日]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[3月31日]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[4月21日]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[4月6日]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[勝海舟]] ・[[西郷隆盛]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[4月16日]] ） - [[毛利元就]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、[[武将]] （+ [[1571]] ） * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[4月28日]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[薩摩藩]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[4月9日]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[思想家]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[毛利元就]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、[[武将]] （+ [[1571]] ） * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[薩摩藩]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[April 11]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[March 31]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[April 21]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 6]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[勝海舟]] ・[[西郷隆盛]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[毛利元就]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、[[武将]] （+ [[1571]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[薩摩藩]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[April 9]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[思想家]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[April 11]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[March 31]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[April 21]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 6]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[勝海舟]] ・[[西郷隆盛]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[毛利元就]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、[[武将]] （+ [[1571]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[薩摩藩]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[April 9]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[思想家]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}

[[sn:March 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]] [[zh:三月十四]] [[en:draft:March 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[April qq]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[March 31]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[April 21]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 6]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[勝海舟]] ・[[西郷隆盛]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[毛利元就]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、[[武将]] （+ [[1571]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第qq代[[薩摩藩]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[April 9]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[思想家]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[April 11]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[March 31]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[April 21]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 6]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[勝海舟]] ・[[西郷隆盛]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[毛利元就]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、[[武将]] （+ [[1571]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[薩摩藩]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[April 9]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[思想家]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}

[[sn:March 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]] [[zh:三月十四]] [[en:draft:March 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[April 11]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[March 31]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[April 21]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 6]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[勝海舟]] ・[[西郷隆盛]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[毛利元就]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1571]] ） * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[薩摩藩]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[April 9]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[思想家]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[毛利元就]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1571]] ） * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[薩摩藩]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[April 11]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[March 31]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[April 21]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 6]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[Katsu Kaishū]] ・[[西郷隆盛]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1571]] ） * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[薩摩藩]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[April 11]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[March 31]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[April 21]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 6]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[Katsu Kaishū]] ・[[西郷隆盛]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1571]] ） * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[Satsuma Domain]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[April 9]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[Thinker]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:March 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]] [[zh:三月十四]] [[en:draft:March 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[April 11]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[March 31]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[April 21]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 6]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[Katsu Kaishū]] ・[[Saigō Takamori]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1571]] ） * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[Satsuma Domain]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[April 9]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[Thinker]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations ==== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}

== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1571]] ） * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[Satsuma Domain]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[April 9]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[Thinker]] （* [[1723]] ）

[[sn:March 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]] [[zh:三月十四]] [[en:draft:March 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[April 11]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[March 31]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[April 21]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 6]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[Katsu Kaishū]] ・[[Saigō Takamori]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1571]] ） * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[Satsuma Domain]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701st year 4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[April 9]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[Thinker]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[April 11]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[March 31]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[April 21]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 6]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[Katsu Kaishū]] ・[[Saigō Takamori]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1571]] ） * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[Satsuma Domain]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701st year 4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[April 9]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[Thinker]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Deprecated s front]] I guess tryiing to remove both at once like that just brought this one back? using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} 19th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[800]] [[April 11]] ） - [[富士山]] が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1257]] [[March 31]] ） - {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元|12=draft}} より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[Genroku]] 14th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1701]] [[April 21]] ） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]] 主・[[浅野長矩]] が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]] に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 6]] ） - [[五箇条の御誓文]] 宣布、[[江戸開城]] をめぐる[[Katsu Kaishū]] ・[[Saigō Takamori]] 会談
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応|12=draft}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1497]] [[April 16]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}} 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} （+ [[1571]] ） * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[April 28]] ） - [[島津斉彬]] 、第11代[[Satsuma Domain]] 主（+ [[1858]] ）
== Deaths == * Genroku14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1701st year 4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]] 、[[赤穂藩]] 主（* [[1667]] ） * [[Kansei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1789]] [[April 9]] ） - [[三浦梅園]] 、[[Thinker]] （* [[1723]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[800]] {{ill|April 11|ja|4月11日}}) – {{ill|Fuji-san|ja|富士山}} erupted (the Enryaku eruption). * [[Shōka]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1257]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōgen|ja|康元|12=draft}} to [[Shōka]]. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1701]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日}}) – At the Matsunorō corridor of Edo Castle, the lord of the Akō Domain, {{ill|Asano Nagamasa|ja|浅野長矩}}, was fatally injured by high-ranking retainers of {{ill|Yoshira Yoshinaga|ja|吉良義央}}; Nagamasa committed seppuku on the same day (the incident known as the Akō Incident). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}}) – The 【Goka Jō no Oneshimon】 (Five Articles of the Imperial Oath) were promulgated, and discussions regarding the surrender of Edo ensued between {{ill|Katsu Kaishū|ja|勝海舟}} and {{ill|Saigō Takamori|ja|西郷隆盛}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1497]] {{ill|April 16|ja|4月16日}}) – {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|毛利元就}}, a military commander (died [[1571]]). * [[Bunka]] 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1809]] {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|ja|島津斉彬}}, the 11th lord of the Satsuma Domain (died [[1858]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1701]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日}}) – {{ill|Asano Nagamasa|ja|浅野長矩}}, lord of the Akō Domain (born [[1667]]). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1789]] {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}}) – {{ill|Miura Baien|ja|三浦梅園}}, a thinker (born [[1723]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十四]]

== Births == * {{ill|Meio|ja|明応|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1497]] {{ill|April 16|ja|4月16日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|毛利元就|12=draft}}, a military commander (died [[1571]]). * [[Bunka]] 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1809]] {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|ja|島津斉彬|12=draft}}, the 11th lord of the Satsuma Domain (died [[1858]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|12=draft}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1701]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Asano Nagamasa|ja|浅野長矩|12=draft}}, lord of the Akō Domain (born [[1667]]). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1789]] {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Miura Baien|ja|三浦梅園|12=draft}}, a thinker (born [[1723]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月14日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[800年]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1257年]][[3月31日]]） - [[康元]]より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[元禄]]14年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1701年]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談
== 誕生日 == * [[明応]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1497年]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}}、[[武将]]（+ [[1571年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]）
== 忌日 == * 元禄14年（グレゴリオ暦1701年4月21日） - [[浅野長矩]]、[[赤穂藩]]主（* [[1667年]]） * [[寛政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1789年]][[4月9日]]） - [[三浦梅園]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1723年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314}}

== できごと == * [[延暦]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[800年]][[4月11日]]） - [[富士山]]が噴火（延暦噴火） * [[正嘉]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1257年]][[3月31日]]） - [[康元]]より正嘉に[[改元]] * [[元禄]]14年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1701年]][[4月21日]]） - 江戸城松の廊下で[[赤穂藩]]主・[[浅野長矩]]が高家肝煎・[[吉良義央]]に刃傷。長矩は即日切腹（[[赤穂事件]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月6日]]） - [[五箇条の御誓文]]宣布、[[江戸開城]]をめぐる[[勝海舟]]・[[西郷隆盛]]会談
== 誕生日 == * [[明応]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1497年]][[4月16日]]） - [[毛利元就]]{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=75}}、[[武将]]（+ [[1571年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[4月28日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、第11代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]）

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|March 14|qq=March 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 19th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:800|800]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Mount Fuji|Fuji-san]] erupted (the Enryaku eruption). * [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1257|1257]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen]] to [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]]. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – At the Matsunorō corridor of Edo Castle, the lord of the Akō Domain, [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], was fatally injured by high-Ranking retainers of [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Yoshira Yoshinaga]]; Nagamasa committed seppuku on the same day (the incident known as the Akō Incident). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]]) – The 【Goka Jō no Oneshimon】 (Five Articles of the Imperial Oath) were promulgated, and discussions regarding the surrender of Edo ensued between [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] and [[:en:Saigō Takamori|Saigō Takamori]].
== Births == * [[:en:Meiō|Meio]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1497|1497]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]], a military commander (died [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]], the 11th lord of the Satsuma Domain (died [[:en:1858|1858]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], lord of the Akō Domain (born [[:en:1667|1667]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1789|1789]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Miura Baien|Miura Baien]], a thinker (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 19th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:800|800]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Mount Fuji|Fuji-san]] erupted (the Enryaku eruption). * [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1257|1257]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen]] to [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]]. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – At the Matsunorō corridor of Edo Castle, the lord of the Akō Domain, [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], was fatally injured by high-Ranking retainers of [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Yoshira Yoshinaga]]; Nagamasa committed seppuku on the same day (the incident known as the Akō Incident). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]]) – The 【Goka Jō no Oneshimon】 (Five Articles of the Imperial Oath) were promulgated, and discussions regarding the surrender of Edo ensued between [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] and [[:en:Saigō Takamori|Saigō Takamori]].
== Births == * [[:en:Meiō|Meio]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1497|1497]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]], a military commander (died [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]], the 11th lord of the Satsuma Domain (died [[:en:1858|1858]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], lord of the Akō Domain (born [[:en:1667|1667]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1789|1789]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Miura Baien|Miura Baien]], a thinker (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 19th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:800|800]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Mount Fuji|Fuji-san]] erupted (the Enryaku eruption). * [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1257|1257]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen]] to [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]]. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – At the Matsunorō corridor of Edo Castle, the lord of the Akō Domain, [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], was fatally injured by high-Ranking retainers of [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Yoshira Yoshinaga]]; Nagamasa committed seppuku on the same day (the incident known as the Akō Incident). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]]) – The 【Goka Jō no Oneshimon】 (Five Articles of the Imperial Oath) were promulgated, and discussions regarding the surrender of Edo ensued between [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] and [[:en:Saigō Takamori|Saigō Takamori]].
== Births == * [[:en:Meiō|Meio]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1497|1497]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]], a military commander (died [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]], the 11th lord of the Satsuma Domain (died [[:en:1858|1858]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], lord of the Akō Domain (born [[:en:1667|1667]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1789|1789]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Miura Baien|Miura Baien]], a thinker (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 19th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:800|800]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Mount Fuji|Fuji-san]] erupted (the Enryaku eruption). * [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1257|1257]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen]] to [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]]. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – At the Matsunorō corridor of Edo Castle, the lord of the Akō Domain, [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], was fatally injured by high-Ranking retainers of [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Yoshira Yoshinaga]]; Nagamasa committed seppuku on the same day (the incident known as the Akō Incident). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]]) – The 【Goka Jō no Oneshimon】 (Five Articles of the Imperial Oath) were promulgated, and discussions regarding the surrender of Edo ensued between [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] and [[:en:Saigō Takamori|Saigō Takamori]].
== Births == * [[:en:Meiō|Meio]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1497|1497]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]], a military commander (died [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]], the 11th lord of the Satsuma Domain (died [[:en:1858|1858]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], lord of the Akō Domain (born [[:en:1667|1667]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1789|1789]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Miura Baien|Miura Baien]], a thinker (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 19th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:800|800]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Mount Fuji|Fuji-san]] erupted (the Enryaku eruption). * [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1257|1257]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen]] to [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]]. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – At the Matsunorō corridor of Edo Castle, the lord of the Akō Domain, [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], was fatally injured by high-Ranking retainers of [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Yoshira Yoshinaga]]; Nagamasa committed seppuku on the same day (the incident known as the Akō Incident). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]]) – The 【Goka Jō no Oneshimon】 (Five Articles of the Imperial Oath) were promulgated, and discussions regarding the surrender of Edo ensued between [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] and [[:en:Saigō Takamori|Saigō Takamori]].
== Births == * [[:en:Meiō|Meio]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1497|1497]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]], a military commander (died [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]], the 11th lord of the Satsuma Domain (died [[:en:1858|1858]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], lord of the Akō Domain (born [[:en:1667|1667]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1789|1789]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Miura Baien|Miura Baien]], a thinker (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 19th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:800|800]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Mount Fuji|Fuji-san]] erupted (the Enryaku eruption). * [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1257|1257]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen]] to [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]]. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – At the Matsunorō corridor of Edo Castle, the lord of the Akō Domain, [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], was fatally injured by high-Ranking retainers of [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Yoshira Yoshinaga]]; Nagamasa committed seppuku on the same day (the incident known as the Akō Incident). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]]) – The 【Goka Jō no Oneshimon】 (Five Articles of the Imperial Oath) were promulgated, and discussions regarding the surrender of Edo ensued between [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] and [[:en:Saigō Takamori|Saigō Takamori]].
== Births == * [[:en:Meiō|Meio]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1497|1497]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]], a military commander (died [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]], the 11th lord of the Satsuma Domain (died [[:en:1858|1858]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], lord of the Akō Domain (born [[:en:1667|1667]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1789|1789]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Miura Baien|Miura Baien]], a thinker (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 14일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十四]][[zh:三月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 14일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十四]][[zh:三月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十四]][[zh:三月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838860]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 14|qq=March 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 19th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:800|800]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Mount Fuji|Fuji-san]] erupted (the Enryaku eruption). * [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1257|1257]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen]] to [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]]. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – At the Matsunorō corridor of Edo Castle, the lord of the Akō Domain, [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], was fatally injured by high-Ranking retainers of [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Yoshira Yoshinaga]]; Nagamasa committed seppuku on the same day (the incident known as the Akō Incident). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]]) – The 【Goka Jō no Oneshimon】 (Five Articles of the Imperial Oath) were promulgated, and discussions regarding the surrender of Edo ensued between [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] and [[:en:Saigō Takamori|Saigō Takamori]].
== Births == * [[:en:Meiō|Meio]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1497|1497]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]], a military commander (died [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]], the 11th lord of the Satsuma Domain (died [[:en:1858|1858]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], lord of the Akō Domain (born [[:en:1667|1667]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1789|1789]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Miura Baien|Miura Baien]], a thinker (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1701|1701]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – [[:en:Asano Naganori|Asano Nagamasa]], lord of the Akō Domain (born [[:en:1667|1667]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1789|1789]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Miura Baien|Miura Baien]], a thinker (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十四]][[zh:三月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十四]][[zh:三月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十四]][[zh:三月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838860]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 14|qq=March 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 19th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|800|en|800|WD=Q23677|lt=800}} {{ill|April 11|en|April 11|WD=Q2501|lt=April 11}}) – {{ill|Mount Fuji|en|Mount Fuji|WD=Q39231|lt=Fuji-san}} erupted (the Enryaku eruption). * [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1257|en|1257|WD=Q5504|lt=1257}} {{ill|March 31|en|March 31|WD=Q2461|lt=March 31}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōgen|en|Kōgen|WD=Q1194242|lt=Kōgen}} to [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]]. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1701|en|1701|WD=Q6814|lt=1701}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21}}) – At the Matsunorō corridor of Edo Castle, the lord of the Akō Domain, {{ill|Asano Naganori|en|Asano Naganori|WD=Q2866316|lt=Asano Nagamasa}}, was fatally injured by high-Ranking retainers of {{ill|Kira Yoshinaka|en|Kira Yoshinaka|WD=Q3132109|lt=Yoshira Yoshinaga}}; Nagamasa committed seppuku on the same day (the incident known as the Akō Incident). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|April 6|en|April 6|WD=Q2506|lt=April 6}}) – The 【Goka Jō no Oneshimon】 (Five Articles of the Imperial Oath) were promulgated, and discussions regarding the surrender of Edo ensued between {{ill|Katsu Kaishū|en|Katsu Kaishū|WD=Q700470|lt=Katsu Kaishū}} and {{ill|Saigō Takamori|en|Saigō Takamori|WD=Q310462|lt=Saigō Takamori}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Meiō|en|Meiō|WD=Q1193841|lt=Meio}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1497|en|1497|WD=Q6702|lt=1497}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16}}) – {{ill|Mōri Motonari|en|Mōri Motonari|WD=Q1156545|lt=Mōri Motonari}}, a military commander (died {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1809|en|1809|WD=Q6919|lt=1809}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|en|Shimazu Nariakira|WD=Q1143856|lt=Shimazu Nariakira}}, the 11th lord of the Satsuma Domain (died {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1701|en|1701|WD=Q6814|lt=1701}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21}}) – {{ill|Asano Naganori|en|Asano Naganori|WD=Q2866316|lt=Asano Nagamasa}}, lord of the Akō Domain (born {{ill|1667|en|1667|WD=Q7588|lt=1667}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1789|en|1789|WD=Q7772|lt=1789}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – {{ill|Miura Baien|en|Miura Baien|WD=Q8192957|lt=Miura Baien}}, a thinker (born {{ill|1723|en|1723|WD=Q6921|lt=1723}}).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十四]][[zh:三月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十四]][[zh:三月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十四]][[zh:三月十四]]
{{Not to be confused with|March 14|qq=March 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 19th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|800|en|800|WD=Q23677|lt=800}} {{ill|April 11|en|April 11|WD=Q2501|lt=April 11}}) – {{ill|Mount Fuji|en|Mount Fuji|WD=Q39231|lt=Fuji-san}} erupted (the Enryaku eruption). * [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1257|en|1257|WD=Q5504|lt=1257}} {{ill|March 31|en|March 31|WD=Q2461|lt=March 31}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōgen|en|Kōgen|WD=Q1194242|lt=Kōgen}} to [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]]. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1701|en|1701|WD=Q6814|lt=1701}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21}}) – At the Matsunorō corridor of Edo Castle, the lord of the Akō Domain, {{ill|Asano Naganori|en|Asano Naganori|WD=Q2866316|lt=Asano Nagamasa}}, was fatally injured by high-Ranking retainers of {{ill|Kira Yoshinaka|en|Kira Yoshinaka|WD=Q3132109|lt=Yoshira Yoshinaga}}; Nagamasa committed seppuku on the same day (the incident known as the Akō Incident). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|April 6|en|April 6|WD=Q2506|lt=April 6}}) – The 【Goka Jō no Oneshimon】 (Five Articles of the Imperial Oath) were promulgated, and discussions regarding the surrender of Edo ensued between {{ill|Katsu Kaishū|en|Katsu Kaishū|WD=Q700470|lt=Katsu Kaishū}} and {{ill|Saigō Takamori|en|Saigō Takamori|WD=Q310462|lt=Saigō Takamori}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Meiō|en|Meiō|WD=Q1193841|lt=Meio}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1497|en|1497|WD=Q6702|lt=1497}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16}}) – {{ill|Mōri Motonari|en|Mōri Motonari|WD=Q1156545|lt=Mōri Motonari}}, a military commander (died {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1809|en|1809|WD=Q6919|lt=1809}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|en|Shimazu Nariakira|WD=Q1143856|lt=Shimazu Nariakira}}, the 11th lord of the Satsuma Domain (died {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1701|en|1701|WD=Q6814|lt=1701}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21}}) – {{ill|Asano Naganori|en|Asano Naganori|WD=Q2866316|lt=Asano Nagamasa}}, lord of the Akō Domain (born {{ill|1667|en|1667|WD=Q7588|lt=1667}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1789|en|1789|WD=Q7772|lt=1789}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – {{ill|Miura Baien|en|Miura Baien|WD=Q8192957|lt=Miura Baien}}, a thinker (born {{ill|1723|en|1723|WD=Q6921|lt=1723}}).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|13|3|15|2|14|4|3|0314|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ar:March 14 (Lunisolar)]]

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 19th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|800|en|800|WD=Q23677|lt=800|1=800}} {{ill|April 11|en|April 11|WD=Q2501|lt=April 11|1=April 11}}) – {{ill|Mount Fuji|en|Mount Fuji|WD=Q39231|lt=Fuji-san|1=Mount Fuji}} erupted (the Enryaku eruption). * [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1257|en|1257|WD=Q5504|lt=1257|1=1257}} {{ill|March 31|en|March 31|WD=Q2461|lt=March 31|1=March 31}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōgen|en|Kōgen|WD=Q1194242|lt=Kōgen|1=Kōgen}} to [[:en:Shōka|Shōka]]. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1701|en|1701|WD=Q6814|lt=1701|1=1701}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21|1=April 21}}) – At the Matsunorō corridor of Edo Castle, the lord of the Akō Domain, {{ill|Asano Naganori|en|Asano Naganori|WD=Q2866316|lt=Asano Nagamasa|1=Asano Naganori}}, was fatally injured by high-Ranking retainers of {{ill|Kira Yoshinaka|en|Kira Yoshinaka|WD=Q3132109|lt=Yoshira Yoshinaga|1=Kira Yoshinaka}}; Nagamasa committed seppuku on the same day (the incident known as the Akō Incident). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|April 6|en|April 6|WD=Q2506|lt=April 6|1=April 6}}) – The 【Goka Jō no Oneshimon】 (Five Articles of the Imperial Oath) were promulgated, and discussions regarding the surrender of Edo ensued between {{ill|Katsu Kaishū|en|Katsu Kaishū|WD=Q700470|lt=Katsu Kaishū|1=Katsu Kaishū}} and {{ill|Saigō Takamori|en|Saigō Takamori|WD=Q310462|lt=Saigō Takamori|1=Saigō Takamori}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Meiō|en|Meiō|WD=Q1193841|lt=Meio|1=Meiō}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1497|en|1497|WD=Q6702|lt=1497|1=1497}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16|1=April 16}}) – {{ill|Mōri Motonari|en|Mōri Motonari|WD=Q1156545|lt=Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari}}, a military commander (died {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571|1=1571}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1809|en|1809|WD=Q6919|lt=1809|1=1809}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28|1=April 28}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|en|Shimazu Nariakira|WD=Q1143856|lt=Shimazu Nariakira|1=Shimazu Nariakira}}, the 11th lord of the Satsuma Domain (died {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1701|en|1701|WD=Q6814|lt=1701|1=1701}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21|1=April 21}}) – {{ill|Asano Naganori|en|Asano Naganori|WD=Q2866316|lt=Asano Nagamasa|1=Asano Naganori}}, lord of the Akō Domain (born {{ill|1667|en|1667|WD=Q7588|lt=1667|1=1667}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1789|en|1789|WD=Q7772|lt=1789|1=1789}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9|1=April 9}}) – {{ill|Miura Baien|en|Miura Baien|WD=Q8192957|lt=Miura Baien|1=Miura Baien}}, a thinker (born {{ill|1723|en|1723|WD=Q6921|lt=1723|1=1723}}).
